SHAPING YOUR WORLD WITH DIAMOND
Shipping from  71083 Herrenberg , Germany
What We Stand For
Worldia is a leading manufacturer of high-quality, superhard cutting tools (PCD, CVDD, PCBN) based in China and employing more than 1100 people worldwide. The company has been in existence for over 20 years and is listed on the Chinese stock market. Innovation, a focus on technology, highest quality standards and consistent customer orientation have enabled Worldia to grow steadily and invest in new product areas and locations.
